# Exorcist Fr. Chad Ripperger — Tucker Carlson (interview transcript)

**Source:** YouTube — *Exorcist Fr. Chad Ripperger: Possessed Politicians, Occult Activity, and Speaking to Satan Himself* (Tucker Carlson Network).

**Watch URL:** https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Of3ys0dmyYc

**Participants:** Tucker Carlson (host); Fr. Chad Ripperger (guest, exorcist).

**Scope:** Opinion and theological framing; not companion Record. Triangulate before ship-facing factual claims.

## Perceiver (neutral skim, ≤200 words)

Ripperger describes demonic influence, possession, and exorcism in Catholic terms (praeternatural vs supernatural, Christ’s permission over demons). Carlson frames Protestant unfamiliarity with exorcism against New Testament emphasis on casting out demons. Topics include psychology vs possession, U.S. culture and law as “seating” influence to named spirits, pacts, occult practice, risks to exorcists, parallels drawn to politics and communism, addiction, pornography, and hope/chastisement for the country.
